word: H5115 - נָוָה - nâvâh - naw-vaw' - Keept at home

sections.paragraph:
Original: נוה

Transliteration: nâvâh

Phonetic: naw-vaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to beautify
    1. (Hiphil) to beautify, adorn
  2. to dwell
    1. (Qal) to dwell, abide, keep at home
  3. (Hophal) rest

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1321,1322

Part(s) of speech: Verb
